# Strongly Implicit Procedure

**Summary**: An iterative method for solving systems of linear equations, often used in multi-phase flow.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] evaluated SIP as a robust alternative to ADIP for complex reservoir problems.

## Key Results and Findings

- SIP is a fast reliable numerical iterative procedure... less subject to rounding errors than ADIP. ([[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993, p. 43]])
